mechanism: Platform changes validated against oases-test (prod-identical management group hierarchy) before promotion to oases-prod. HeyAzure is the canary landing zone in both hierarchies.
why: Without a parallel test hierarchy, platform changes deploy directly to production — failures surface against live landing zones with no safe rollback. HeyAzure ensures deployment parity is verified, not assumed.

related.note: Application workloads belong in oases-prod — oases-test is not an application environment.
oases-test must mirror oases-prod structurally for meaningful validation.
Test hierarchy is the target the promotion gate validates against.

violations: Platform change merged without prior successful deployment to oases-test.
Application workload landing zone created in oases-test.
